task_description: Inspect belt for tears, tracking, and wear. Measure belt tension at tail pulley (target 80-110 lbs). Record in Form QC-104.
safety_notes: Inspect while conveyor is running at idle speed only. Do not touch belt while in motion.

task_description: Lubricate all 12 conveyor bearing points with Mobilux EP2 grease. Apply 3-5 pumps per fitting. Wipe excess grease.
safety_notes: Wear cut-resistant gloves. Do not lubricate while conveyor is running.

task_description: Inspect drive motor coupling for wear and alignment. Check frame bolts for tightness. Clean belt surface with MNT-CLN-001.
safety_notes: Full LOTO required on MCP-AL3 breaker CB-14. See SOP-002.

task_description: Full belt replacement — measure belt wear, replace if > 20% wear from nominal thickness. Recalibrate speed sensor after replacement.
safety_notes: Full LOTO required. Isolate electrical and pneumatic energy sources per SOP-002. Minimum 2 technicians required.

task_description: Check hydraulic fluid level — maintain between MIN and MAX sight glass marks. Inspect for external leaks around seals, fittings, and hoses.
safety_notes: Wear safety glasses and nitrile gloves. Do not add fluid if system is under pressure.

task_description: Inspect hydraulic hoses and fittings for cracks, abrasion, and loose connections. Check pump coupling for wear.
safety_notes: Full LOTO required. After electrical lockout, cycle controls 5 times to bleed hydraulic pressure. Verify accumulator gauge reads 0 PSI.

task_description: Take hydraulic fluid sample for contamination analysis. Submit to lab (Form MNT-301). Check and adjust ram parallelism — max 0.05mm deviation.
safety_notes: Full LOTO. Bleed hydraulic system before removing any fittings. Wear face shield when taking fluid sample — fluid under pressure risk.

task_description: Full hydraulic fluid change. Overhaul pump seals. Calibrate tonnage monitoring system. Third-party ASME compliance inspection.
safety_notes: Full LOTO. Contractor must sign in and obtain visitor safety briefing. Minimum 2 technicians. Used fluid must be disposed per environmental SOP-EHS-007.

task_description: Inspect wire spool — replace if < 1 kg remaining. Check gas cylinder pressure — replace if < 500 PSI. Clean torch nozzle of spatter. Verify robot home position.
safety_notes: Always confirm robot is in HOME position before entering cell. Check cell door interlock is functioning. Use anti-spatter spray — do not use bare hands.

task_description: Inspect all 6 robot axis joints for unusual noise or resistance. Clean controller cabinet air filters. Check torch conduit for kinks.
safety_notes: Full LOTO on cell panel CSP-09 before entering robot work envelope. Disable teach pendant enable switch.

task_description: Lubricate all axis joints per FANUC grease schedule (see robot manual Appendix B). Calibrate TCP (tool center point). Run diagnostic program DIAG_AL3_09.
lubricant_required: FANUC Grease A (axes 1-3); FANUC Grease B (axes 4-6)
safety_notes: Full LOTO required. Only FANUC-certified technicians may perform joint lubrication. Use only manufacturer-specified greases — mixing greases damages seals.
reference_procedure: SOP-002; FANUC Arc Mate 100iD Maintenance Manual

task_description: Replace controller memory batteries (3x AA). Inspect arm cable harness full length. FANUC-certified service inspection.
safety_notes: Schedule with FANUC service team minimum 4 weeks in advance. Ensure memory backup is performed before battery replacement. Full LOTO required.

task_description: Calibrate conveyor speed sensor — target accuracy ±0.2 mpm. Replace tail pulley bearings if bearing noise is detected.
safety_notes: Full LOTO on MCP-AL3 breaker CB-14. Use calibrated tachometer for speed verification.

task_description: Clean die area — remove all metal chips, dust, and debris. Inspect die set guide pins and bushings. Lubricate die set per die card.
lubricant_required: Die lubricant per die card specification
safety_notes: Full LOTO before die access. Tooling is heavy — use die cart and mechanical lift assist. Wear cut-resistant gloves.

task_description: Inspect and tighten all ground connections on robot, positioner, and power source. Check torch cable for outer jacket wear.
safety_notes: Full LOTO. Poor ground connections cause weld quality issues and can create shock hazard. Use torque wrench on ground lugs — 15 Nm.
